blended.narrative: Loon Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
